body:
nekomimidusteon:

the catgirl princess is cold and thus demands cuddles right now, under the blanket. sure, she’ll allow you to use the catgirl princess while you cuddle her but if a single part of her exits the blanket and feels the cool air she’s sentencing you to the dungeon for a week
